intro: Alarms blare across the plant floor. The reactor core has overloaded, and raw current arcs hungrily from its housing, looking for somewhere to discharge.
title: Overcharge the Core
description: The reactor's surplus energy is desperate for an outlet. Channel it into one of your Pokemon to permanently surge a stat - but each surge you take risks a short-circuit that wastes the whole session and chips the Pokemon. Stabilize at any time to keep what you have gained.
invalidSelection: This Pokemon cannot safely channel the core.

1.label: Channel the core
1.tooltip:
(+) Permanently surge one Pokemon's Sp. Atk or Speed
(?) Each surge risks a short-circuit (lose the session + chip damage)
1.selected: You clamp the leads on and let the current flow...

2.label: Pull the breaker
2.selected: You throw the breaker, and the core sputters back into dormancy.

surgePrompt: {{statName}} climbs with the current ({{surges}} surge(s) held). Push another surge through, or stabilize and keep what you have?

push.label: Surge again
push.tooltip:
(+) Another permanent boost
(?) Higher chance of a short-circuit

bank.label: Stabilize
bank.tooltip: (+) Keep every surge you have channelled

surged: Current floods in - the surge holds, and the stat is locked in for good!
stabilized: You ease off the leads. The channelled power settles in, permanent.
shortCircuit: The core SHORT-CIRCUITS! The surge collapses, this session's gains are lost, and the backlash jolts your Pokemon hard.
shortCircuitFaint: The core SHORT-CIRCUITS violently! All that stacked current discharges at once - the surge is lost and your Pokemon is knocked out cold!
